summary: “So, there are plenty of failure points, and when you have hundreds of thousands or millions of something, something will eventually fail,” Peter Salanki, co-founder and CTO of CoreWeave, tells Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Technology Analyst Anurag Rana. “Instead of throwing out half the potential capacity, we say that we expect some of these to fail. Then we build systems, automation and processes around handling those failures gracefully.” In this episode of Tech Disruptors, the pair discuss

title: Stocks Drop, Oil Jumps After Trump Says Ceasefire with Iran Is "Over" | Bloomberg Brief 07/08/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示与伊朗的停火“结束”后股市下跌，油价上涨彭博简报 07/08/2026
summary: US equity futures slump and oil extends gains as President Trump says a tentative ceasefire with Iran is over. The US had struck 80 sites in Iran ahead of the president's remarks at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. Mark McCormick of BMO Capital Markets discusses the impact of fresh geopolitical tensions.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oman Fertilizer Firm Defies War Worries and Surges 23% on Debut

title_cn: 罗马尼亚保持欧盟最高利率，通胀率维持在 10% 以上

summary: Indian stocks tumbled and the rupee weakened after oil prices gained following US President Donald Trump’s remark that the tentative ceasefire with Iran had ended after recent attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Coffee Prices to Stay High as Volatility Lingers, Lavazza Says

summary: The latest bout of volatility in the coffee market is set to linger, complicating the outlook for consumers hoping to see lower prices, according to Italian roaster Luigi Lavazza SpA.

summary: Argentina is set to make a major payment on its dollar bonds this week, pulling off a feat few investors thought possible while the country refuses to tap global debt markets.

title: Trump & Iran Back in Focus, Korean Stocks Tumble | The Opening Trade 7/8/2026
title_cn: 特朗普和伊朗重新成为焦点，韩国股市暴跌|开盘交易 7/8/2026
summary:
Stocks fell, bond yields spiked and oil rallied after President Donald Trump thrust geopolitical risks back into focus by declaring the ceasefire between the US and Iran to be over.

The AI rotation trade is gathering pace in Asia as investors pull money from the chipmakers that powered this year’s rally and hunt for cheaper ways to play the technology boom. 

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Heat Sends Power Demand Far Beyond Forecasts
title_cn: 美国高温导致电力需求远远超出预期
summary: The country’s biggest grid operator says consumption likely hit a record, smashing a high that had stood for about 20 years.

title_cn: 印度国家银行提取超过 15 亿美元的离岸存款
summary: State Bank of India has so far raised more than $1.5 billion from foreign-currency deposits under a special program launched last month for overseas citizens, people familiar with the matter said.

summary: Chicago soybean oil futures climbed to a three-week high after fresh US military strikes on Iran sparked a rally in crude prices, raising the prospect of greater demand for biofuel feedstocks.

title_cn: 高盛表示，盈利惊喜浪潮将难以重演
summary: The wave of AI-fueled earnings surprises that powered stocks in the last earning season will be tough to repeat, making it unlikely the results alone will spark a major rally, according to Christian Mueller-Glissmann.

title: India Seeks Safe Hormuz Passage for Nine Ships as Truce Falters

Today's guests: Mike Bell, RBC BlueBay Market Strategy Head; Ionela Ciolan, Wilfried Martens Centre for European Studies Research Officer  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Ed Yardeni, president of Yardeni Research, says the flare-up of fighting with Iran rekindles market concern that rising oil prices will stoke inflation -- and force the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was ordered by the French competition watchdog to hold talks with news organizations over copyright payments, following two complaints that the social media giant was abusing its dominant position.

title: Alibaba Shares Jump Most in 10 Months as Rebound Hopes Grow
title_cn: 随着反弹希望增强，阿里巴巴股价创 10 个月来最大涨幅
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s shares surged the most since September after investors turned optimistic on its earnings and shifted capital into major Chinese internet companies that had lagged the market.

title: Bolloré Wins Paris Court Ruling Over Vivendi Control Dispute
title_cn: Bolloré 赢得巴黎法院对维旺迪控制权纠纷的裁决
summary: Vincent Bolloré won a Paris ruling that — if it survives a further challenge — could end up saving his company billions of euros after judges backed his long-held claim that he didn’t control Vivendi SE before a split of the media conglomerate in 2024.

title: Apple Loses Spat With EU Over App Store and iPhone Rules

summary: Apple Inc. lost a European Union court fight to stop its App Store and iPhone operating system being hit by the full-force of the bloc’s antitrust crackdown on Big Tech.

title: Labor Crunch Tests Growth Limits for US Data Center Builders
title_cn: 劳动力紧缩考验美国数据中心建设者的增长极限
summary: Following several quarters of record order books, a skilled-labor shortage is testing the limits of growth for the craft-labor providers who build data centers across the US.

title: Goldman Sachs Says Hyperscalers Are 'Well-Positioned'
title_cn: 高盛表示超大规模企业“处于有利地位”
summary: Christian Mueller-Glissmann, managing director for portfolio strategy and asset allocation at Goldman Sachs, says the levered positioning toward semiconductors got a bit "extreme" and that the trend is reversing. "The hyperscalers are quite well-positioned right now because they still own a lot of the infrastructure," Mueller-Glissmann tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI to Roll Out Top AI Model Globally After Limited Preview
title_cn: OpenAI 将在有限预览后在全球推出顶级人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI is set to release its most advanced model widely on Thursday and is expanding its preview globally, the company said.

title: Temasek Assets Break $400 Billion as AI Bets Boost Returns
title_cn: 人工智能押注推动回报淡马锡资产突破 4000 亿美元
summary: Singaporean state-owned investor Temasek Holdings Pte is ramping up its exposure to artificial intelligence and the Americas, a shift which helped push its net portfolio value to S$518 billion ($401 billion) in the last financial year.

title: Netherlands and UK Sign $3.2 Billion Deal on Amphibious Ships
title_cn: 荷兰和英国签署价值 32 亿美元的两栖舰协议
summary: The Netherlands and the UK signed a £2.4 billion ($3.2 billion) agreement to produce new amphibious transport ships, part of a flurry of deals between European NATO members in Ankara.

title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Valuation
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova融资估值110亿美元
summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.

title: Australian Pension Shrugs Off AI Bubble Fears, Plans to Buy Dips
title_cn: 澳大利亚养老金摆脱对人工智能泡沫的担忧，计划逢低买入
summary: UniSuper, one of Australia’s largest pension funds, is looking to buy any pullback in US technology stocks, shrugging off concerns over lofty valuations as it bets artificial intelligence will fuel years of earnings growth.

title: Chip Worker Shortfall Endangers US Factory Revival
title_cn: 芯片工人短缺危及美国工厂复兴
summary: A growing nationwide shortage of high-skilled workers threatens to delay construction of billions of dollars in new semiconductor plants across the US and constrain future chip production unless the industry pools resources and the government keeps up funding, according to a new report.

title: Iluvatar CoreX Is Said to Consider Share Sale After 428% Rally
title_cn: 据称 Iluvatar CoreX 在上涨 428% 后考虑出售股票
summary: Shanghai Iluvatar CoreX Semiconductor Co. is considering a share sale to raise at least $800 million in Hong Kong after soaring since its initial public offering in January, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tencent WeChat AI Agent Shows Promise in Super-App Fight: Review
title_cn: 腾讯微信AI代理在超级应用之战中展现出前景：评论
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is fighting to restore its reputation as a tech innovator after falling behind in the race to develop groundbreaking frontier AI models. It’s taking an important step in that direction with Xiaowei: a prototype AI agent that it envisions eventually running errands for a billion-plus users across a WeChat ecosystem spanning millions of apps.

title: KKR-Backed SmartHR Is Said to Delay Tokyo IPO Beyond This Year
title_cn: KKR 支持的 SmartHR 据称将推迟今年东京首次公开募股
summary: Japanese human resources platform operator SmartHR Inc. has delayed its plans for an initial public offering to next year at the earliest as investors viewed the company’s targeted valuation as too high, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Samsung Scales Up Storage Production for Nvidia’s Vera Rubin
title_cn: 三星为 Nvidia 的 Vera Rubin 扩大存储产量
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has begun mass production of its most advanced data center storage drive, which is set for use inside Nvidia Corp.’s upcoming Vera Rubin platform.

title: Samsung to Get Jump on Apple’s First Foldable With New Phones in July
title_cn: 三星将于 7 月推出首款可折叠新手机，抢占苹果先机
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. will host its next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, when the leading foldable phone maker is expected to unveil a Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a shorter and wider design that resembles Apple Inc.’s planned folding iPhone.

title: Billionaires Arrive for the Annual Sun Valley Conference
title_cn: 亿万富翁齐聚太阳谷年度会议
summary: Billionaires descend today on Sun Valley, Idaho, for the Allen & Co. annual gathering of media, technology and finance moguls. Some of the attendees include Hank Paulson, David Zaslav, Neal Mohan and Barry Diller. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety | The Close 7/7/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能焦虑而暴跌收盘价 7/7/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Cboe Global Markets VP, Head of Derivatives Market Intelligence Mandy Xu, TeraWulf Chairman & CEO Paul Prager, CFRA Research Equity Research Analyst Keith Snyder, Former NATO Ambassador Kay Bailey Hutchison, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Jordan Jackson, Bernstein Research US Semiconductors Senior Analyst Stacy Rasgon, American Century Investments CEO Jonathan Thomas, Neuberger Private Markets Global Head Tony Tutrone, & Spring Health CEO & Co-Founder April Koh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
title_cn: 随着人工智能债务涌入市场，亚马逊的新债券受到冷遇
summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around there’s less fanfare.

title: Wall Street Unleashes Wave of Bullish SpaceX Ratings
title_cn: 华尔街掀起看涨 SpaceX 评级浪潮
summary: Wall Street’s biggest banks shopped SpaceX shares for $135 a pop during its record initial public offering. Just weeks later, sell-side analysts from many of those same banks are telling clients those shares should be worth $236 each on average.

title: Bain Capital's Pagliuca on AI, Quantum Computing, Sports Valuations
title_cn: 贝恩资本的 Pagliuca 谈人工智能、量子计算、体育估值
summary: A clutch of growing industries, including artificial intelligence, are the key focus of investment for Bain Capital LP Senior Adviser Steve Pagliuca. He says AI is entering a 10-to-20-year growth phase as it shifts from theoretical applications to physical deployment across sectors. The Boston Celtics co-owner owner also talks about the rising valuations of professional franchises with Bloomberg's Michelle Davis on the sidelines of the Allen & Co Inc. conference in Sun Valley, Idaho. They spoke on Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Allies Commit to Giving Ukraine Military Aid Through 2027
title_cn: 北约盟国承诺在 2027 年之前向乌克兰提供军事援助
summary: NATO members pledged €70 billion ($80 billion) in military aid to Ukraine for 2026 and “at least the equivalent levels” in 2027, ensuring continued support as Russia’s war shows few signs of abating.

title: Trump Warns US Ceasefire With Iran May Be Over
title_cn: 特朗普警告美国与伊朗的停火可能结束
summary: President Donald Trump said his tentative ceasefire with Iran is "over" after the US launched a new wave of strikes against the Islamic Republic and revoked a waiver that allowed the sale of Iranian oil. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Plans More Flexibility for Industry in Carbon Market Review
title_cn: 欧盟计划在碳市场审查方面为工业提供更大的灵活性
summary: The European Union aims to give its ailing industrial sector more flexibility in an upcoming reform of the bloc’s flagship carbon market, while ensuring companies boost investment in clean technologies.

title: Behind Closed Doors at NATO, Trump Mostly Wants to Talk Iran
title_cn: 特朗普在北约闭门会议上最想谈论伊朗问题
summary: President Donald Trump spent the bulk of his speech at the NATO summit airing frustrations about Iran, telling allies that the US isn’t interested in regime change anymore and that European countries have let him down repeatedly.

title: Maine Democrats Rule Out Platner Role in Picking Replacement
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人排除普拉特纳在挑选继任者中的作用
summary: Maine’s Democratic Party urged Graham Platner to immediately withdraw from the race for a US Senate seat following allegations of sexual assault and vowed he would have no role in selecting his replacement.

title: Trump’s Iran Cloud Darkens After Declaring Ceasefire Over
title_cn: 宣布停火结束后，特朗普的伊朗阴云变得更暗
summary: The peace has proven to be as complicated as the fighting

title: Donald Trump Threatens to Strike Iran Again Tonight
title_cn: 唐纳德·特朗普威胁今晚再次袭击伊朗
summary: A banner outside the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum (NSDIF), in Ankara, Turkey. Photographer: Krisztian Bocsi/Bloomberg

title: What's Next After Trump Says Iran Ceasefire 'Over'?
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗停火“结束”后下一步是什么？
summary: US President Donald Trump said a tentative ceasefire with Iran has ended, raising the prospect of an end to peace negotiations and a potential renewal of fighting between the two countries. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports from Ankara, Turkey, where Trump is attending the NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Bounce Sees Labour Winning If UK Election Were Held Now
title_cn: 如果现在举行英国大选，伯纳姆反弹认为工党获胜
summary: The UK’s governing Labour Party would win the most seats in a general election, according to the first detailed poll carried out since Keir Starmer cleared a path for Andy Burnham to succeed him as prime minister.

title: Trump Renews Call to End Trade With ‘Terrible Partner’ Spain
title_cn: 特朗普再次呼吁结束与“糟糕伙伴”西班牙的贸易
summary: US President Donald Trump once again called for an end to trade with Spain, citing its lack of support for the war in Iran and what he described as its failure to meet NATO commitments.

title: Duterte’s Lawyer Says No Proof VP Hired a Hitman to Kill Marcos
title_cn: 杜特尔特的律师称没有证据表明副总统雇佣了杀手杀死马科斯
summary: There’s no proof that Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte hired a hitman to kill rival President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., her defense counsel said, challenging a key charge against Duterte on the third day of her impeachment trial.

title: Hungary Narrows Budget Gap to $10.8 Billion After June Surplus
title_cn: 匈牙利 6 月盈余后预算缺口缩小至 108 亿美元
summary: Hungary narrowed its first-half shortfall after posting the biggest monthly budget surplus since 2010, helping the new government as it takes on one of the biggest fiscal challenges in the European Union.

title: How Murky Finances are Haunting Reform UK’s Farage
title_cn: 模糊的财务状况如何困扰改革英国的法拉奇
summary: Nigel Farage, leader of the right-wing Reform UK party and architect of Brexit, is facing an uncertain future after damaging media reports about his financial affairs. Farage, who maintains he hasn’t broken any rules, announced his resignation as a member of Parliament on July 7, and said he would run for reelection for his seat in eastern England.

title: Duterte Trial Brings Philippines to a Crossroads
title_cn: 杜特尔特审判将菲律宾带到十字路口
summary: Sara Duterte is accused of plotting to assassinate President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., misusing public funds and amassing unexplained wealth.

title: Ukraine Says It Attacked Russian Tankers, Two Oil Refineries
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯油轮和两座炼油厂
summary: Ukraine says it hit two Russian oil refineries and several tankers off the country’s coast, the latest in a wave of attacks against key energy infrastructure.

title: Temasek CIO on AI Capex and Geopolitical Risks
title_cn: 淡马锡首席信息官谈人工智能资本支出和地缘政治风险
summary: Temasek International's Chief Investment Officer Rohit Sipahimalani tells Bloomberg in a wide-ranging interview how the Singaporean state-owned investor navigates geopolitical tensions between US and China, as well as the potential risks presented by surge in capex in the US market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa Ties $219 Million Johannesburg Funding to Debt Plan
title_cn: 南非将 2.19 亿美元约翰内斯堡资金与债务计划挂钩
summary: South Africa’s National Treasury said it will release funding that’s been withdrawn from dozens of municipalities after they’ve submitted plans on how they’ll pay their debts.

title: Trump Vents Anger With Iran and Warns Ceasefire May Be ‘Over’
title_cn: 特朗普发泄对伊朗的愤怒并警告停火可能“结束”
summary: US President Donald Trump warned a fragile ceasefire with Iran may be over, raising the prospect of an end to peace negotiations and a potential renewal of full-on fighting between the two countries.

title: Trump’s Greenland Obsession Is Back: ‘Stupidly, We Gave it Back’
title_cn: 特朗普对格陵兰岛的痴迷又回来了：“愚蠢的是，我们把它还给了”
summary: US President Donald Trump’s fixation with owning Greenland returned with a vengeance at the NATO summit as he launched into a series of broadsides against European allies for letting him down in Iran.

title: French Presidential Race Gears Up: Here’s Who You Need to Know
title_cn: 法国总统竞选如火如荼：以下是您需要了解的人
summary: The French presidential election is about nine months off, but campaigning is underway: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen declared her candidacy Tuesday and traveled to a town southwest of Paris after an appeals court cleared the legal hurdle that threatened to sideline her.

title: UK and Turkey to Sign Security and Defense Pact at NATO Summit
title_cn: 英国和土耳其将在北约峰会上签署安全与防务协定
summary: The UK and Turkey are poised to sign a security and defense partnership pact on the sidelines of the NATO summit, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Belgium May Miss 2035 NATO Spending Target, Deputy PM Says
title_cn: 副首相称比利时可能无法实现 2035 年北约支出目标
summary: Belgium may miss a NATO target to spend 5% of gross domestic product on defense by 2035, as it struggles to make-up for years of underspending in the sector.

title: Belgian Foreign Minister Predicts 2-1 Win Against Spain in World Cup
title_cn: 比利时外长预测世界杯2-1战胜西班牙
summary: Belgian Foreign Minister Maxime Prevot discusses the controversy surrounding the national football team's match against US in the World Cup. He also looks ahead to Friday's quarter-final against Spain. "I hope that thanks to the presence of our King in the stadium, we will win 2-1," Prevot tells Bloomberg's Oliver Crook at the NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He's Not Happy With NATO About Greenland
title_cn: 特朗普表示他对北约关于格陵兰岛的问题不满意
summary: US President Donald Trump said Greenland "doesn't help Denmark, but it helps us." Speaking in Ankara, Turkey, alongside NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte, Trump added he is "very unhappy" with the alliance regarding the semi-autonomous Danish territory. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Aims for Saudi Investment Deal This Year as Carney Visits
title_cn: 卡尼访问加拿大，今年力争与沙特达成投资协议
summary: Canada is aiming to sign an investment pact with Saudi Arabia in the coming months, as Prime Minister Mark Carney prepares to be the first Canadian leader in 26 years to visit the wealthy Middle Eastern nation.

title: China Cites Trump Remarks in Rare Criticism of US Taiwan Envoy
title_cn: 中国罕见批评美国台湾特使，引用特朗普言论
summary: China took the rare step of publicly criticizing the top US diplomat in Taiwan, invoking select remarks by President Donald Trump to argue that the envoy’s actions are destabilizing relations.

title: Trump Says Ceasefire Over Following Attacks on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗遇袭后停火
summary: President Donald Trump tells reporters that the tentative ceasefire between the US and Iran is "over," raising the prospect of a renewed military conflict between the two countries. "They're sick people. They're led by sick people, and they're vicious, violent people," Trump tells reporters. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Ankara, Turkey, where Trump is attending the NATO Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jailed Indian Ordered Canada’s Sikh Activist Murder, US Says
title_cn: 美国称被监禁的印度人下令谋杀加拿大锡克教活动人士
summary: US prosecutors charged alleged Indian gang members with directing the 2023 assassination of a prominent Sikh activist in Vancouver, a killing which prompted a diplomatic crisis between India and Canada.
